name: ctu-state-exam
description: Self-hostable study webapp for Czech Technical University (ČVUT) state exam questions. Currently bundled with NI (FIT) AI master's program 2026 content — SPOL (shared) + ZI (Znalostní Inženýrství specialization).
author: Yannick Gibson

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run server
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm run generate
